rejects.reason: no noncomedogenic claim on manufacturer page: https://www.drunkelephant.com/collections/moisturizers/lala-retro-nourishing-whipped-refillable-moisturizer-999DE00000115.html states role (moisturizer) and cadence (apply one pump morning and night, use daily) but never states non-comedogenic / won't clog pores; the only 'comedogenic' mention is a customer Q&A question whose brand reply avoids the claim

instruction_cadence_unknown not clearable: manufacturer page https://www.drunkelephant.com/collections/serums/b-hydra-intensive-hydration-serum-with-hyaluronic-acid-856556004180.html How-to-use ('Apply one pump to a clean, dry face, neck, chest, hands...') states no usage frequency; the only 'daily' on the page is marketing copy ('this daily flood of hydration'), not a usage instruction
